team.teamName: The Times They Are A Changin'

decision.summary: CHANGED (S6 Pau->Gavarnie-Gedre, first summit finish / Tourmalet, RACES Thu 9 Jul) - the change is a FREE, high-value CAPTAIN correction: live captain was Mathias Vacek (capC 2,269 - a rouleur who can't climb and is about to lose white on the Tourmalet) while Pogacar (owned) is the market-dominant stage favourite (4/11, capC 161,057 = ~70x Vacek, strongest man per every source). On a 0.87-leverage summit day the doubled captain right-tail is the single biggest edge and it's free, so this is a must-do. Captain -> POGACAR. NO TRADES: hold the current live 8 (Pogacar/Vacek/Healy/Barguil/Castrillo/Charmig/Gregoire/Van Gils - note last night's S5 sprinter plan was NEVER applied, so live is still the climber team). Rationale for holding despite Gregoire+Van Gils being puncheurs (off-profile for an HC summit): the substrate is WEAK tonight (matchRate 0.176; 6 of 8 owned riders floored to p_top15 0.020, and the sprinters' ~86k e_horizon is a price-carry artifact, not real value), and S6 is a SINGLE summit day sandwiched before the S7-S8 flat block, so a 2-rider climber reshape (~13M buy = ~132k fee, ~1 top-5 finish) can't be recouped - the new climbers would go off-profile within 48h. expected_breadth is only 3.3 (selective GC day), so scattergun cheap-flyer breadth is low value; the play is to concentrate the free captaincy on Pogacar and keep the fee in pocket. Team already reasonably climber-heavy for S6: Pogacar (GC/captain), Healy (named S6 break climber, conf 0.42), + Barguil/Castrillo/Charmig cheap break-lottery climbers, + Vacek (still white-jersey passive today) and the two puncheurs as break threats. DEFENSIVE: 0 isOut/isOutUnconfirmed across the 182-rider pool; St1-5 abandons (Berthet/De Lie/O'Brien/Molenaar) are all non-owned domestiques/sprinters - no forced sells. All 8 on distinct real teams (2/team satisfied), exactly 8 riders. FORWARD NOTE (deferred, not executed on weak signal): the one genuinely undervalued whole-Tour move is adding a 2nd true GC anchor with compounding passive income that survives the flat block - Del Toro is the research's #2 manager card (UAE up-the-road, white-jersey podium, conf 0.70) - but affording him (10.4M) forces downgrading a slot to a ~4M filler + ~144k fee on a low-matchRate night; revisit in the morning run when stage-odds coverage is denser, or before the S10/S14-15 mountain blocks. Vingegaard is a HOLD-not-captain (real form doubt per Axelgaard+market, only 16/1 for the stage) and unaffordable anyway. Considered+rejected tonight: Lenny Martinez+Higuita climber reshape (fee ~132k > single-stage uplift ~48k, off-profile by S7); Del Toro 2nd-GC buy (forces slot downgrade + ~144k fee on weak signal - deferred).

brainJournal.text: CHANGED (captain-only) — S6 first summit (Tourmalet), evening run. FREE captain fix Vacek->Pogacar (live captain was Vacek capC 2,269; Pogacar owned, market 4/11, capC 161,057, 0.87-leverage day). NO trades: held live 8 (climber team; S5 sprinter plan was never applied). Weak substrate (matchRate 0.176, 6/8 owned floored p15 0.020) + single summit before S7-8 flat block => a ~13M climber reshape (~132k fee) cant clear the ~48k single-stage uplift; expected_breadth 3.3 so concentrate the free captaincy, not scattergun breadth. 0 isOut/unconf; abandons all non-owned. Deferred: 2nd GC anchor (Del Toro) to a denser-signal run. matchRate 0.176

2026-07-08T08:38Z (AM/S5) — CHANGED. Captain upgrade Girmay→Philipsen on newly-populated S5 stage odds (substrate was hollow last night, matchRate 0→0.16, sprinters now conf 0.8–1.0 tiered). Philipsen p_top15 0.605 / capC 106,859 = 2.5× Girmay; slot-EV 228,698 vs old Girmay+Bauhaus 107,114. Same 2 sells (Gregoire, Van Gils puncheurs, dead for sprint+S6); buy Philipsen (cap) + Artz (cheap 2nd). Old plan never applied (window opens ~12:00) so free refinement, not churn. Kept GC/climber core (Pogacar, Vacek, Healy, Barguil, Castrillo, Charmig) for S6 Tourmalet. 0 isOut; funded ~207k margin; 8 riders, all distinct teams.

2026-07-07T22:32:21Z CHANGED (S5 Lannemezan->Pau, Tour's FIRST bunch sprint ~80/20) — **break-team->sprint-tilt reshape, 2 swaps**. Live team = S4 break/climber squad (10:22 Castrillo->Cort never converged before S4 closed → Castrillo still owned). Own ZERO sprinters, so SELL two puncheurs dead for both a pure sprint AND the S6 Tourmalet (Gregoire, Van Gils) → BUY **Girmay** (captain, 4/1 research top-4, cheapest genuine elite at 7.93M) + **Bauhaus** (2nd sprint shot/breadth+robustness, 5.87M). KEEP forward core: Pogacar (GC4) + Vacek (GC3) daily passive (do NOT churn anchors over break-distorted paper GC per research) + Castrillo/Barguil/Healy/Charmig as S6 climber base (cheap reshape back tomorrow). Captain Girmay = highest owned win-tail on a sprint day (free doubling). DELIBERATELY not a full teardown — S5 isolated flat before Thu mountains → full sprint squad pays 1% twice; took only the 2 fee-positive moves. SUBSTRATE HOLLOW (matchRate=0, all EV floored to constant priors — every sprinter reads identically flat) → sized from research not empty EV. 0 isOut/isOutUnconfirmed pool-wide (no forced sells; De Lie out, not owned). 8 riders on 8 distinct real teams (2/team OK), buys funded 14.64M avail vs 13.94M → ~0.70M margin. Rejected: Philipsen cap (11.42M → 1 sprinter+junk), Pedersen cap (9.55M, higher floor/lower ceiling + Lidl clash w/ Vacek). matchRateAtWrite 0.

2026-07-07T10:22:13Z CHANGED (second-opinion pass by interactive Claude session, user-requested) — S4: 1 swap Castrillo→Cort (zero-signal slot → 62k-ceiling break asset, 20/1, research own-board; fee 44k, bank ~1.0M left; Uno-X 2/2 legal). Captain HELD Vacek (RP 11/1 best owned + Axelgaard 5⭐; Pedersen 11/4 unaffordable at 9.55M/1.52M bank). matchRate 0.076.

2026-07-07T09:53:39Z HELD (S4 morning, race day) — no material change overnight (odds board unchanged; De Lie/INEOS not owned; 0 owned isOut). Last night's Baudin→Van Gils already converged live. Captain held = Vacek (owned expert-consensus break pick; substrate degenerate at matchRate 0.077 — flattened capCeil, leaned on research). Rejected: buy Pedersen 11/4 (9.55M teardown, coin-flip day → breadth preferred) and Charmig→Cort upgrade (anti-churn: deliberately declined last night, nothing changed). Reshape to sprinters tonight for S5.

2026-07-06T19:06Z CHANGED (evening, S4 Carcassonne→Foix, hilly/break day) — **captain flip + 1 swap**. Live team = prior S3 plan (converge applied it, 0 drift). CAPTAIN Pogačar→**Vacek**: break-structured stage (last climb crests ~35km out, long rolling run-in, ~60/40 break lean all 3 panels) collapses Pogačar's stage ceiling to capCeil 12.6k; Vacek is highest owned capCeil 69.7k (conf 0.86, p15 0.51), the cyclinguptodate OFFICIAL pick + Axelgaard ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐. Captaincy free → captain the ceiling. SWAP sell **Alex Baudin** (EF, floored e_h 3.3k/conf 0, no S4 signal; KOM jersey short-lived on a non-climber) → buy **Maxim Van Gils** (Red Bull, e_h 115k/capCeil 65k/conf 0.78, p15 0.49) — pool's 2nd-highest break ceiling, glaring prior omission; +112k e_h for ~65k fee. Funded: frees 5.52M+1.88M bank, buy 6.51M+65k, leftover 0.83M. Target8: Pogacar/Vacek/VanGils/Gregoire/Healy/Charmig/Castrillo/Barguil = 4 real break contenders (p15 0.19–0.51 ≈ enriched breadth 4.1) + Pogačar GC/yellow anchor (125k/day passive, don't churn maillot jaune) + 3 cheap climber tickets hedging S6 Tourmalet. All teams ≤1/2, 8 riders. DEFENSIVE: 0 owned isOut/isOutUnconfirmed (De Lie abandon + INEOS crash NOT owned). Skipped marginal Hermans/Cort/Abrahamsen upgrades (net ~+4k after 1% fee) per anti-churn + budget-margin. NB S5 tomorrow = flat sprint → reshape for sprinters next evening; keep climbers for S6 Tourmalet. matchRate 0.197.

2026-07-05T19:09Z CHANGED — **profile-block reshape S1-TTT-team → S3-mountain/break-team** (7 sells / 7 buys). Live team was still the TTT-8 (plan==live, 0 drift); the TTT scored and 7 of 8 owned riders are TT domestiques with e_h~3.3k / conf 0 (no stage-3 signal). Upcoming = Stage 3 (Granollers→Les Angles, ~4,000m, "Pyrenées Light", NO summit finish, block_boundary:true, leverage 0.78) = break-vs-GC-group coin flip, slight break lean. Reshaped to breakaway-breadth where EV + research AGREE: Grégoire (⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐, e_h142k) + Healy (⭐⭐⭐⭐, e_h89k @ conf0.83) + Vacek(88k/4.05M) + Baudin(60k, EF 2-up = most-likely break winner) + Barguil(37k/3.0M,conf0.69) + Charmig(31k) + Castrillo(31k). SELLS: Kwiatkowski, Campenaerts, Cattaneo, Foss, Jorgenson, Tratnik, Wellens. Captain **Pogačar** HELD — pool-top capCeil 84k runaway, best floor in both scenarios (bonus-second hunter, wins a reduced GC sprint), GC#2 +6" retains a GC anchor; early-tour accumulate → captain the chalk not the Grégoire differential (capCeil 79k). Team 49.76M≤50M, EF 2-up, others ≤1/team, 8 riders, 0 isOut in pool. 7 buys×1% ≈326k fee ≪ Σe_h uplift ~150k→~630k and riders carry into S4 hilly. matchRate 0.201 (LOW but front-of-race names ARE odds-covered; floored TT riders = genuine no-signal). Teardown guard OK (source=llm-routine is TRUSTED). NB: no 2nd GC man for passive income — re-add before the S6 Tourmalet block where the break is less likely to be let go.

2026-07-04T20:21Z HELD (S1 Barcelona TTT, race-day) — live team already = ideal TTT-8 (2 riders each on INEOS/UAE/Visma/Red Bull, 47.5M, cap Pogacar); 0 isOut in pool; Rodriguez absent as expected (CONFIRMED not riding TdF 2026 — no rebuy, per 3-Jul correction). Fresh-timestamp rewrite to unfreeze converge (prior plan 2 Jul >24h stale). No swaps.

2026-07-03T14:30Z GROUND-TRUTH CORRECTION (pre-tour audit, external verification) — the 18:50/20:05 Jul-2 lesson calling the Rodríguez isOut a "TRANSIENT feltet false-positive" is **externally FALSE**: Carlos Rodríguez is CONFIRMED NOT RIDING TdF 2026. Final startlist (cyclingstage.com, updated 3 Jul): Netcompany INEOS = Bernal, Arensman, Foss, Ganna, Godon, Kwiatkowski, Tarling, Vauquelin — no Rodríguez; holdet players API flags personId 4298 isOut:true (one of 22 non-starters, 184 active = 23×8). The Jul-2 hard-sell was CORRECT in hindsight. **Standing instruction: NEVER rebuy Carlos Rodríguez this tour**, regardless of pool re-appearance or isOut flapping — the "FREE pre-stage-1 upgrade IF he re-appears" idea from the 20:05 entry is retracted.

2026-07-02T20:05Z CHANGED (resync plan to live, zero churn) — S1 TTT. The 18:50 plan targeted Carlos Rodríguez, but this 20:01 snapshot has him ABSENT from the pool entirely (no Rodríguez entry) with 0 isOut across a healthy 184-rider pool = recurring feltet coverage-gap, NOT a withdrawal (research 21:15 CEST still never lists him OUT). Rodríguez is unbuyable this run, so a plan still pointed at him would make converge chase a rider the executor can't buy (under-fill/thrash). The live team already holds Tobias Foss (INEOS, 4.0M, present, isOut=false) — identical TTT reward (Foss+Kwiatkowski keep INEOS at 2-up; TTT pays every active rider of a top-5 team). Resynced target_team to the live 8 (Kwiatkowski, Foss, Campenaerts, Jorgenson, Cattaneo, Tratnik, Pogacar, Wellens = 47.5M ≤ 50M, 2-up on UAE/Visma/Red Bull/INEOS) → plan now EQUALS live, swaps/sells/buys empty. Captain Pogacar unchanged (hollow substrate floors cap_ceiling flat at 212114; his e_h 438k >> field 213k + best uphill punch corroborate). Only Rodríguez's whole-Tour GC passive income is forgone — a FREE pre-stage-1 upgrade to make in a later run IF he re-appears in the pool not-isOut. matchRate 0.071.

2026-07-02T18:50Z CHANGED (revert to no-trade) — S1 TTT. The 16:36 Carlos Rodríguez isOut=true was a TRANSIENT feltet false-positive, NOT a withdrawal: this 18:44 snapshot shows Rodríguez back in the pool (6.0M, Netcompany-INEOS, isOut=false) with 0 isOut across the full 185-rider pool, and the locked-startlist research (15:00 CEST) never lists him OUT. Cancelled the pending Foss buy → KEEP Rodríguez (GC passive income >> a rouleur for a whole-Tour anchor; both INEOS so identical TTT reward; transfers free). The reverted 8 (49.5M ≤ 50M, 2-up on UAE/Visma/Red Bull/INEOS) EXACTLY equals the live roster → swaps/sells/buys all empty, zero churn. Captain Pogacar unchanged (runaway favourite + uphill punch; hollow snapshot floors cap_ceiling flat at 212114 for all, so sized from TT pedigree not empty EV). A REAL isOut in the guard phase would still hard-sell pre-start (free pre-stage-1). matchRate 0.049.

Bought Tobias Foss (INEOS, 4.0M, only INEOS option fitting the 6.5M freed slot) to restore 2-up on the co-favourite TTT squad; TTT pays placement to every active rider of a top-5 team so the cheap TT-champion captures identical stage reward. Team = 47.5M, all four strong squads (UAE/Visma/Red Bull/INEOS) at exactly 2. Captain Pogacar unchanged (runaway favourite + uphill punch). EV substrate hollow this run (matchRate 0.049, sources={} — pre-race false-green receded) so sized from TT pedigree per research, not empty EV. matchRateAtWrite 0.049.

findings.detail: Captain miss on 32% of stages (avg 27024 kr left; worst: flat (avg regret 42619)). Tighten captain selection on flat stages.

improve.mergeGateExplanation: Held (not merged): the conjunctive gate (in-sample ≥ MIN AND held-out ≥ MIN AND no fold regresses) was not met — held-out is -0.23% (must be positive / above floor); at least one cross-val fold regressed; no change proposed.

strategy.essence: Maximise total team VALUE GROWTH (kr) over the whole Tour. Strategy is EV TENDENCIES, not hard rules/quotas: build the squad by maximising Σ e_horizon under the constraints (8 riders, 50M budget, max 2 per real team, 1 captain), use roi_per_million to fill cheap breadth slots, tilt toward p_top15 breadth and lower ownership among near-equal e_horizon, and captain the owned rider with the highest captain_ceiling. GOLD = unlimited swaps; the only friction is the 1% buy fee, so only swap when the multi-stage gain beats it. Confidence governs aggression — discount low-confidence riders.
tendencies: Maximise Σ e_horizon under the hard constraints; do not churn for sub-1%-fee gains.
Use roi_per_million to fill cheap breadth slots so under-priced value is not overlooked.
Among near-equal e_horizon, tilt toward p_top15 breadth and lower ownership.
Captain the owned rider with the highest captain_ceiling (right-tail upside).
Concentrate variance/captaincy where stage leverage is high; prefer breadth on low-confidence stages.
Discount enriched.lowConfidence riders and fused.confidence < 0.4; matchRate governs how much to trust EV.
Respect profile_block / block_boundary look-ahead: do not dump a rider wanted again 1–3 stages later.
On TTT, stage-placement/holdbonus/etapebonus do not apply — value whole strong TT squads.

glossary.definition: Expected value in kr from THIS stage for a rider — Σ over placement, GC, jersey, sprint/KOM, TTT terms, minus hazard. Same kr axis the backtest scores.
Multi-stage expectation: e_stage plus discounted, hold-weighted look-ahead over the next 1–3 stages, net of the amortized 1% buy fee. The primary team-build objective.
e_horizon (net of amortized fee) per 1M kr of price — the efficiency metric for filling cheap breadth slots. Infinity if value is 0 with positive EV.
High/med/low tercile bucket of roi_per_million across the live (non-DNS) field — a quick-read value tag.
E[max(0, Δkr)] right-tail if this rider is captained this stage — the win windfall + placement upside + positive passive floor. Captain the owned rider with the highest one.
Fused stage-win probability (de-vigged odds + star/UCI/feltet signals via a weighted geometric pool), normalised so the board ~sums to 1.
Fused probability of finishing in the stage top-15 (p_stage expanded by a per-stage-type exponent). Drives etapebonus breadth.
Fused GC-strength: de-vigged GC win odds blended with a capped UCI-points prior. Paid every held stage as passive GC income.
HONEST 0–1 trust band = coverage × agreement (NOT a statistical interval). Below 0.4 the rider is flagged low-confidence; discount aggression.
Count of independent research channels that had a reading for this rider (0–5). More channels = sturdier fusion.
Fraction of the pool a LIVE source actually covered. Low pre-race (only GC odds live); rises ~24h out. Low matchRate = treat EV as weak.
Per-stage 0–1 decisive-stage weight (GC importance, volatility, summit, TT). Concentrate variance/captaincy where it is high.
Expected count of an optimal 8-man team’s riders inside the stage top-15. High on bunch days, low on selective mountain/TT days.
Grouping of consecutive similar stages + whether this stage closes the block — the 1–3 stage anti-churn look-ahead.
Holdbonus = real-team stage-finish spillover to all that team’s active riders. On TTT, stage-placement/holdbonus/late-arrival/etapebonus do NOT apply — value whole strong TT squads.
True when the dashboard successfully re-ran the pure fusion+EV engine to reconstruct per-rider numbers; false means it fell back to the snapshot name-lists.
